name: codebase-memory-mcp
description: Fast code intelligence engine for AI coding agents — single static binary MCP server

tools.name: index_repository
tools.description: Index a repository into the knowledge graph. Special mode 'cross-repo-intelligence': skip extraction, only match Routes/Channels across projects to create CROSS_HTTP_CALLS/CROSS_ASYNC_CALLS/CROSS_CHANNEL edges. Requires target_projects param.

target_projects.description: Projects to search for cross-repo links. Use ["*"] for all indexed projects.

persistence.description: Write compressed artifact to .codebase-memory/graph.db.zst for team sharing.

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Get the indexing status of a project

tools.name: delete_project
tools.description: Delete a project from the index

tools.name: search_graph
tools.description: Search the code knowledge graph for functions, classes, routes, and variables. Use INSTEAD OF grep/glob when finding code definitions, implementations, or relationships. Three search modes: (1) query for BM25 full-text search, (2) name_pattern for regex matching, (3) semantic_query for vector cosine search. Supports pagination via limit/offset.

parameters.query: Natural-language or keyword full-text search (BM25 with camelCase splitting)
parameters.name_pattern: Regex pattern for exact name matching
parameters.label: Filter by node label
parameters.semantic_query: Array of keywords for vector cosine search
parameters.offset: Skip first N results for pagination

tools.name: trace_path
tools.description: Trace paths through the code graph. Modes: calls (callers/callees), data_flow (value propagation with args at each hop), cross_service (through HTTP/async Route nodes). Use INSTEAD OF grep for callers, dependencies, impact analysis, or data flow tracing.

parameters.parameter_name: For data_flow: scope to specific parameter
parameters.edge_types: Array of edge types to follow

tools.name: detect_changes
tools.description: Detect code changes and their impact

parameters.since: Git ref or date to compare from (e.g. HEAD~5, v0.5.0, 2026-01-01)

tools.name: query_graph
tools.description: Execute a Cypher query against the knowledge graph for complex multi-hop patterns, aggregations, and cross-service analysis. Response includes 'total' row count. 100k row ceiling. Complexity properties: cyclomatic (complexity), cognitive, loop_count, loop_depth, transitive_loop_depth, linear_scan_in_loop, alloc_in_loop, recursion_in_loop, unguarded_recursion.

parameters.max_rows: Optional row limit. Default unlimited (up to 100k ceiling)

tools.name: get_graph_schema
tools.description: Get the schema of the knowledge graph (node labels, edge types)

tools.name: get_code_snippet
tools.description: Read source code for a function/class/symbol. First call search_graph to find the exact qualified_name, then pass it here. Accepts full qualified_name (exact match) or short function name (returns suggestions if ambiguous).

parameters.qualified_name: Full qualified_name from search_graph, or short function name

tools.name: get_architecture
tools.description: Get high-level architecture overview — packages, services, dependencies, and project structure. Includes 'clusters': Leiden community detection over the call/import graph, surfacing de-facto modules with label, member count, cohesion score, representative top_nodes, and packages/edge_types.

tools.name: search_code
tools.description: Graph-augmented code search. Finds text patterns via grep, then enriches results with the knowledge graph: deduplicates matches into containing functions, ranks by structural importance (definitions first, popular functions next, tests last). Modes: compact (signatures only), full (with source), files (just paths). No offset — raise limit or narrow query to see more.

tools.name: manage_adr
tools.description: Create or update Architecture Decision Records

parameters.sections: Array of section names (for sections mode)

tools.name: ingest_traces
tools.description: Ingest runtime traces to enhance the knowledge graph
